title: echinolobium coronarium
intro: Echinolobium coronarium, also known as the Indian coral tree, is a tropical plant species in the family Fabaceae, characterized by its vibrant flowers and medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Echinolobium coronarium include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting digestion, among others. The plant is often prepared into herbal teas, capsules, or powders to make the most of its medicinal properties.
